lakeformation.tagassociation.CfnAbout: The `AWS::LakeFormation::TagAssociation` resource represents an assignment of an LF-tag to a Data Catalog resource (database, table, or column). During a stack operation, CloudFormation calls AWS Lake Formation `AddLFTagsToResource` API to create a `TagAssociation` resource and calls the `RemoveLFTagsToResource` API to delete it.

lakeformation.tagassociation.LFTags.Description: A structure containing an LF-tag key-value pair.

lakeformation.tagassociation.Resource.Description: UTF-8 string (valid values: `DATABASE | TABLE`).  The resource for which the LF-tag policy applies.
